falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held above 5,100; this would prove the structural support thesis failed and the analog is broken

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28 and rapidly mean-reverting; sustained elevation above 35 indicates systemic stress absent in the prior pattern, falsifying the 'controlled correction' signal implied by the 39 blowoff score

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts by more than -50 basis points and holds for 3+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with a modestly positive or flat curve; a deepening inversion would signal recessionary dynamics not present in the matched pattern, proving the macro regime has shifted from soft-landing to hard-landing

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
